title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0738
summary: 1 Acting under § 5(b) of the Trading with the Enemy Act,1 the Alien Property Custodian vested in himself the American assets of Interhandel, a Swiss corporation.2 Interhandel sued in the District Court to recover the assets. The Custodian3 answered alleging that the Swiss corporation was dominate...
